title: Gittensory - Codex usage (self-host)
description: Codex review observability for the self-hosted stack. Prometheus panels are subscription-CLI attempt counters for the selected range; durable review records come from ai_usage_events and must be read with their status. USD cost appears only when the Codex CLI emits a cost field.

panels.title: Reported cost
panels.description: USD cost reported by Codex JSON/JSONL output in the selected range, if available. Subscription CLIs may not emit this.

panels.title: CLI attempts
panels.description: Codex CLI attempts in the selected range. Failed or timed-out attempts can still appear here.

panels.title: Reported CLI tokens
panels.description: Tokens reported by Codex CLI output in the selected range. This is not billing-grade cost accounting.

panels.title: Successful review records
panels.description: Durable Codex-attributed ai_review_pr records with status=ok.

targets.queryText: SELECT count(*) AS reviews FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND status = 'ok' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%')
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(*) AS reviews FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND status = 'ok' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%')

panels.title: CLI attempts by model and effort

targets.queryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, sum(estimated_neurons) AS estimated_neurons FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%') GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, sum(estimated_neurons) AS estimated_neurons FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%') GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT status, count(*) AS count FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%') GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT status, count(*) AS count FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%') GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

targets.queryText: SELECT created_at, model, status, estimated_neurons, detail, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.repoFullName') AS repo, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.pullNumber') AS pr FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT created_at, model, status, estimated_neurons, detail, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.repoFullName') AS repo, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.pullNumber') AS pr FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND (('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex+%' OR ('+' || model || '+') LIKE '%+codex:%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
